global.description: The ad features a dark background with a prominent product display and clear call to action.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: product display
elements.description: A rectangular area featuring three stylized food containers, suggesting a food delivery service.

elements.label: main message
elements.description: Text in a bold font stating 'Hungry? We got you', positioned centrally to attract attention.

elements.label: additional info
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that reads 'Late-night deals available', providing more context.

elements.label: price tag
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€19.99' in a prominent position, indicating the cost of the service.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Install now', encouraging users to take action.

elements.label: sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the word 'SALE' prominently displayed, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: headline text
elements.description: Text at the top of the ad reading 'PlateSprint SALE', designed to grab attention immediately.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Late-night deals available
